author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Pawmi, Pawmo, Pawmot | POKÉTOON Shorts
A young girl makes an adorable discovery—a Pawmi, Pawmo, and Pawmot dancing together! Overwhelmed by their cuteness, she asks her dad to catch all three of them. Her dad gives it his best shot, but it won’t be easy...
Now then...which one was Pawmot, again?

#Pokemon #Poketoon #Shorts
